title: chrysosplenium oxygraphoides
intro: Chrysosplenium oxygraphoides, also known as golden spleenwort or Chinese golden spleenwort, is a type of flowering plant in the saxifrage family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties. Chrysosplenium oxygraphoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in some modern herbal remedies.
